description: Coordinate customer lifecycle outreach with LLM-generated messaging and delivery controls.
name: Customer Lifecycle Email Copilot

product.agent_role: Campaign planner, copywriter, policy checker, delivery executor, inbox responder.
product.benefit: This can become a vertical lifecycle-growth product because it connects agent reasoning to real delivery systems and customer state.
product.customizable_for: Retention campaigns, onboarding journeys, renewal nudges, education sequences.
product.customize: Replace the sample customer snapshot with CRM data, add lifecycle events, tune policy gates, and connect approved email or Slack providers.
product.example: Synthetic customer snapshots flow through campaign planning, copy generation, policy checks, email execution, and reply handling.
product.how_it_works: Synthetic customer snapshots flow through campaign planning, copy generation, policy checks, email execution, and reply handling.
product.input: Replace the sample customer snapshot with CRM data, add lifecycle events, tune policy gates, and connect approved email or Slack providers.
product.investor: This can become a vertical lifecycle-growth product because it connects agent reasoning to real delivery systems and customer state.
product.one_line: Coordinate customer lifecycle outreach with LLM-generated messaging and delivery controls.
product.output: Prepared emails, sent-event logs, reply handling events, and campaign summaries.
product.problem: Customer outreach changes as replies, segments, policies, and delivery state evolve; static templates miss timing, context, and governance.
product.simulation_type: Lifecycle campaign loop with inbox and delivery state.
product.target_users: Growth, lifecycle marketing, and customer success teams.

description: Evaluate price changes against competitor moves, inventory pressure, and revenue impact.
name: Dynamic Pricing Profit Optimizer

product.benefit: Dynamic pricing has direct profit impact and is a strong vertical for agentic simulation with human-reviewable recommendations.
product.customizable_for: Retail, travel, marketplaces, subscriptions, manufacturing quotes.
product.customize: Replace synthetic demand with commerce, competitor, inventory, and margin data; tune elasticity, guardrails, and promotion rules.
product.example: A connected thermostat SKU faces competitor moves and inventory pressure, and the agent chooses price increase, discount, or match actions.
product.how_it_works: A connected thermostat SKU faces competitor moves and inventory pressure, and the agent chooses price increase, discount, or match actions.
product.input: Replace synthetic demand with commerce, competitor, inventory, and margin data; tune elasticity, guardrails, and promotion rules.
product.investor: Dynamic pricing has direct profit impact and is a strong vertical for agentic simulation with human-reviewable recommendations.
product.one_line: Evaluate price changes against competitor moves, inventory pressure, and revenue impact.
product.output: Pricing recommendation with revenue and inventory tradeoffs.
product.problem: Pricing is dynamic and coupled: competitors, demand, inventory, and margin move together faster than static rules can explain.
product.simulation_type: Demand, competitor price, inventory, and revenue simulation.
product.target_users: Pricing teams, category managers, and revenue management leaders.

description: Monitor facility video streams, detect visible humans, describe observable appearance and activity, and escalate safety-relevant observations with VL model reasoning.
name: Facility Safety Video Guardian

product.benefit: This illustrates vertical AI for physical operations: agents reason over evolving sensor state, preserve event trails, and trigger controlled review workflows.
product.customizable_for: Door monitoring, restricted-area alerts, retail safety, warehouse operations.
product.customize: Point the live camera stream at an approved facility source, tune sampling cadence and alert cooldown, add site-specific safety policies, and connect security notification channels.
product.example: A door-camera stream is sampled, an Ollama-backed agent checks whether a person is visible, and alerts are throttled to avoid noise.
product.how_it_works: A door-camera stream is sampled, a VL model checks whether a human face is visible, cooldown state suppresses duplicate alerts, and the run store records events and artifacts for review.
product.input: Live video source URI, VL model endpoint, sampling cadence, cooldown policy, mock payloads, and optional notification destination.
product.investor: This illustrates vertical AI for physical operations: agents reason over evolving sensor state and trigger controlled workflows.
product.one_line: Monitor facility video streams, detect visible humans, describe observable appearance and activity, and escalate safety-relevant observations with VL model reasoning.
product.output: Human detection events, observable appearance and activity descriptions, alert decisions, and notification payloads.
product.problem: Video monitoring is continuous, noisy, and operationally sensitive; teams need stateful alerts, cooldowns, and explainable observations rather than raw frames.
product.simulation_type: Video stream sampling with alert state.
product.target_users: Facilities, security, safety operations, and property management teams.

description: Compare retention interventions before deploying them to at-risk customers.

product.benefit: Retention is measurable and budgeted; this blueprint can evolve into a revenue-copilot product tied to CRM workflows.
product.customizable_for: SaaS retention, subscription commerce, financial services, telecom.
product.customize: Replace synthetic health metrics with CRM, product usage, support tickets, billing, and NPS data; tune action costs and segment rules.
product.example: A mid-market SaaS segment deteriorates, and the agent chooses success calls, loyalty offers, or product-fix campaigns.
product.how_it_works: A mid-market SaaS segment deteriorates, and the agent chooses success calls, loyalty offers, or product-fix campaigns.
product.input: Replace synthetic health metrics with CRM, product usage, support tickets, billing, and NPS data; tune action costs and segment rules.
product.investor: Retention is measurable and budgeted; this blueprint can evolve into a revenue-copilot product tied to CRM workflows.
product.one_line: Compare retention interventions before deploying them to at-risk customers.
product.output: Retention intervention plan with expected churn and budget tradeoffs.
product.problem: Churn risk changes with sentiment, product issues, and budget constraints; one-shot LLM suggestions do not show cost or state tradeoffs.

description: Plan staffing and deflection actions as service demand, queue waits, and SLA risk change.

product.benefit: Service capacity is a concrete buyer problem with clear ROI in SLA, staffing cost, and customer satisfaction.

product.customize: Connect ACD/WFM systems, interval forecasts, schedule data, abandonment curves, and skill-based routing constraints.
product.example: Call arrivals rise, wait time crosses the SLA line, and the agent chooses overtime, staff shifting, or self-service deflection.
product.how_it_works: Call arrivals rise, wait time crosses the SLA line, and the agent chooses overtime, staff shifting, or self-service deflection.
product.input: Connect ACD/WFM systems, interval forecasts, schedule data, abandonment curves, and skill-based routing constraints.
product.investor: Service capacity is a concrete buyer problem with clear ROI in SLA, staffing cost, and customer satisfaction.

product.output: Staffing forecast and capacity action plan.
product.problem: Staffing decisions are expensive and time-sensitive; dashboards show queue waits but do not simulate next-interval choices.

description: Optimize disruption responses before inventory, supplier delays, and customer service levels break down.
name: Supply Chain Resilience War Room

product.benefit: Supply-chain resilience is a large enterprise pain point where optimization plus LLM recommendations can become an operations command center.
product.customizable_for: Manufacturing, retail, healthcare supplies, logistics networks.
product.customize: Connect ERP, supplier EDI, demand forecasts, inventory systems, and lane-level costs; tune the Pyomo objective, budget, lane capacities, service penalties, and delay assumptions.
product.example: Industrial sensor inventory tightens in the Northeast while delays rise, and a Pyomo model allocates budget across expedite freight, supplier switching, and inventory allocation before the agent explains the plan.
product.how_it_works: Industrial sensor inventory tightens in the Northeast while delays rise, and a Pyomo model allocates budget across expedite freight, supplier switching, and inventory allocation before the agent explains the plan.
product.input: Connect ERP, supplier EDI, demand forecasts, inventory systems, and lane-level costs; tune the Pyomo objective, budget, lane capacities, service penalties, and delay assumptions.
product.investor: Supply-chain resilience is a large enterprise pain point where optimization plus LLM recommendations can become an operations command center.
product.one_line: Optimize disruption responses before inventory, supplier delays, and customer service levels break down.
product.output: Disruption response plan with optimized mitigation quantities, action history, and supplier-lane ranking.
product.problem: Demand spikes and supplier delays compound over time; static dashboards show the fire but do not optimize budget-constrained mitigation paths.
product.simulation_type: Inventory, demand, supplier-delay, and Pyomo optimization simulation.
product.target_users: Supply chain operators, procurement leaders, and operations executives.

description: Compress enterprise discovery into a board-ready strategy recommendation pack.

description: Map AI and cyber requirements to evidence and produce an audit-ready control readiness pack.
name: AI Control Room

product.agent_role: AI, cyber, and control readiness agent.

product.how_it_works: A synthetic GenAI claims assistant readiness packet maps policy requirements to evidence, identifies missing controls, scores readiness, and generates an audit evidence package.

description: Turn requirements and vendor responses into a scored recommendation and implementation roadmap.

description: Benchmark Membrane SDK working memory on large-repo code analysis with bounded context packets.
name: Business Context Memory Compression Code Analysis

product.agent_role: Repo architect, dependency mapper, risk classifier, context compressor, briefing author.
product.benefit: Large-repo code analysis is a high-value enterprise workflow where memory quality directly affects latency, cost, confidence, and auditability.
product.customizable_for: Architecture review, codebase onboarding, migration planning, technical due diligence, and large-repo code review.
product.customize: Replace the Django tree fixture with another repository, tune fixture_max_files, adjust token budgets, and add organization-specific risk policies or source categories.
product.example: A metadata-only Django tree fixture seeds hundreds of code facts and generated notes; agents compress them into an architecture briefing with source refs intact.
product.how_it_works: A metadata-only Django tree fixture seeds hundreds of code facts and generated notes; agents compress them into an architecture briefing with source refs intact.
product.input: Replace the Django tree fixture with another repository, tune fixture_max_files, adjust token budgets, and add organization-specific risk policies or source categories.
product.investor: Large-repo code analysis is a high-value enterprise workflow where memory quality directly affects latency, cost, confidence, and auditability.
product.one_line: Benchmark Membrane SDK working memory on large-repo code analysis with bounded context packets.
product.output: Compressed code-analysis handoff, final architecture briefing, and context-memory benchmark report.
product.problem: Large codebases produce more facts than an LLM can safely carry; Membrane working memory must preserve source refs, subsystem boundaries, pinned repo facts, and private review notes under tight context budgets.
runtime_features: token, latency, quality, and privacy telemetry
product.target_users: Engineering leaders and platform teams evaluating memory systems for code analysis agents.

description: Stress a portfolio against drawdown, rate shocks, and liquidity pressure before recommending rebalancing.
name: Portfolio Crash Stress Lab

product.benefit: Asset-management risk copilots are commercially attractive because decisions are high-value and require explainable scenario reasoning.
product.customizable_for: Wealth management, treasury, family offices, robo-advisory risk overlays.
product.customize: Connect holdings, factor exposures, risk models, macro scenarios, tax constraints, and policy limits.
product.example: A stagflation shock raises rates and drawdown while liquidity falls, and the agent chooses hedge, cash, or defensive rebalance actions.

product.output: Portfolio risk report and rebalance recommendation.

description: Rank property acquisition opportunities with working memory over noisy ZIP-code history, broker flow, financing constraints, and prior decision outcomes.

description: Show the core runtime pattern: an LLM agent observes a changing queue and acts over repeated ticks.

product.benefit: This is the smallest proof of the platform thesis: agents reason inside systems, not outside them.
product.customizable_for: Support queues, claim processing, review pipelines, fulfillment operations.

product.how_it_works: A work queue grows, capacity and quality drift, and an operations agent chooses whether to add capacity, protect quality, or hold policy.

description: Run role-scoped context packets through a multi-agent audit decision workflow.

description: Run a full human-in-the-loop decision workflow with review requests, responses, revisions, and auditable applied actions.

description: Show an LLM agent calling a forecast tool before deciding how to rebalance resources.
